blocks.text: Woodland at -13 runs away with Houston while Reitan and Ventura languish outside the top 100. A forgettable Saturday for Norwegian golf — the week ahead promises far better.
🚴 Sun 11:00 — Gent-Wevelgem: Wærenskjold, Abrahamsen and Hoelgaard chase Norway's spring classic moment
♟️ Wed 16:00 — Carlsen opens FIDE Candidates — the battle for the World Chess Championship challenger crown begins
